body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40214", "cvss": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-282", "name": "Improper Ownership Management"}], "description": "In OpenStack Cyborg before 16.0.1, the Accelerator Request (ARQ) API does not enforce project ownership at any layer. The project_id column in the database is never populated (NULL for every ARQ), database queries have no project filtering, and policy checks are self-referential (the authorize_wsgi decorator compares the caller's project_id with itself rather than the target resource). Any authenticated non-admin user can complete various actions such as deleting ARQs bound to other projects' instances, aka cross-tenant denial of service.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00206, "percentile": 0.10659}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mmpc-xjxr-5hf8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-13T01:37:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mmpc-xjxr-5hf8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mmpc-xjxr-5hf8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40214"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-07T22:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-05-08T00:31:34Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40214", "https://bugs.launchpad.net/openstack-cyborg/+bug/2144056", "https://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/07/6", "https://security.openstack.org/ossa/OSSA-2026-011.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mmpc-xjxr-5hf8"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openstack/cyborg", "summary": "OpenStack Cyborg's Accelerator Request (ARQ) API does not enforce project ownership at any layer", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T01:37:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mmpc-xjxr-5hf8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "16.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "openstack-cyborg"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 16.0.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
